mechanics.excerpt: device known as neurohelmet picks Up the neural impulses of the pilot and transmits them to the 'Mech's control systems. The pilot uses his Or her own sense of balance keep the BattleMech upright and can make constant corrections to the vehicle $ move_ ments with degree of control impossible for joysticks and foot pedals alone . Heat sinks, interconnected by complex cooling system , dissipate the massive amounts of heat the 'Mech gener- ates.
